title: UMeWorld Advances Malaysia Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Feedstock Facility into Industrial Execution
content: UMeWorld Limited (OTC: UMEWF) has advanced its Malaysia Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) feedstock facility into the industrial execution phase. The project will be managed by a newly formed subsidiary, Verdant Sustainable Fuel Sdn. Bhd., incorporated in January 2026. Designed to address the global scarcity of qualified low-carbon feedstocks, the facility will utilize UMeWorldâ€™s technology to convert difficult-to-process waste lipidsâ€”such as palm oil mill effluent (POME) and used cooking oilâ€”into SAF-ready renewable fuel intermediates. This process enables compatibility with existing refinery infrastructure, avoiding costly modifications. The facility is engineered to meet EU ReFuelEU carbon-intensity standards and will have an initial nameplate capacity of approximately 10,000 metric tonnes per year. Site selection is targeted for completion within 90 days, with construction expected to begin later in 2026.
author: Analysts Account
